ogTitle: Munro Plains vs Murarrie: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Munro Plains and Murarrie.
heading: Munro Plains vs Murarrie — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Munro Plains, Queensland and Murarrie, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Munro Plains and Murarrie have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Munro Plains or Murarrie safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Munro Plains has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Murarrie scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Munro Plains scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Murarrie scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Munro Plains or Murarrie?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Munro Plains has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
